text: The battery life is incredible — I went three days without charging. Build quality feels premium, screen is sharp. Only gripe is the camera in low light.
Returned it within a week. Software is buggy, keyboard feels cheap, and the fan noise under any load is unbearable. Not worth the price.
It's fine. Does what it says on the box. Nothing exciting. I wouldn't buy again but I wouldn't warn a friend away either.
Absolutely love it. Noise cancellation is the best I've used, comfort over long flights is outstanding, and the companion app is thoughtful. Pricey but earned.
Great sound, terrible battery. Had to charge every 2 days. Earcups also cracked within a month. Going back to my old pair.
Perfect for the price. Runs every game I throw at it at medium settings. Case design is boring but thermals are surprisingly good.
Disappointed. The stitching came undone on the strap after two weeks. Customer service was slow. Material feels like plastic despite 'genuine leather' claims.
Five stars. Fast delivery, easy setup, exactly as described. Works flawlessly with my existing home setup. Would buy again.
Mixed feelings. The camera is outstanding but the phone overheats during gaming. Battery drains fast with the always-on display enabled.
Bought this for travel and it has been a game changer. Folds compact, weight is manageable, keyboard is responsive enough for coding sessions.
Do not buy. Arrived damaged, replacement also had a scratched screen, and returns took four weeks to refund. Never again with this brand.
Solid build, loud speakers, simple interface. Remote is clunky but I use a universal one anyway. Picture quality is better than my previous TV at twice the price.
The stitching and leather feel premium, battery hits my expectations, but the proprietary charging cable is a dealbreaker. Lost mine on a trip.
Meh. Works. Not as loud as advertised, bass is muddy, but it was on sale so I can't complain too much.
Gorgeous screen, terrible typing experience. Key travel is too shallow, and the trackpad registers accidental palm contact constantly. Won't keep.
Great for the price point. The vacuum picks up pet hair well and navigates around furniture better than my old unit. Loud but acceptable.
Ergonomic and quiet. The scroll wheel is smooth, side buttons are mapped well. Software is the weak point — frequent crashes on Mac.
Terrible fit. Ordered my usual size and they run at least a full size small. Fabric is itchy. Had to return for a refund.
Exactly what I needed. Fast boot, quiet operation, plenty of ports. Would have liked USB-C but HDMI and Ethernet suffice for my setup.
Very happy. Installed in 10 minutes, app works on both iOS and Android, and the motion detection is accurate. Night vision is grainy but usable.
